pick_language_subtitle: Dooro luqadda aad jeclaan lahayd inaad ku isticmaasho SomSpot. Waad bedeli kartaa waqti kasta.
onboarding_subtitle_one: Soo hel maqaaxiyaha ugu fiican, raashinka, iyo farmashiyaha kugu xeeran gudaha Soomaaliya.
onboarding_subtitle_two: Helitaanka heshiisyo gaar ah iyo waqti dhab ah oo ka imanaya meelaha aad jeceshahay ee maxalliga ah.
onboarding_subtitle_three: U kaydi dalabyada boorsadaada oo ku dalbato dukaanka tabo fudud.
welcome_subtitle: Albaabkaaga ganacsiga maxalliga ah ee ugu fiican iyo heshiisyo gaar ah.
login_to_account: Gal koontadaada si aad u sii waddo
join_somspot: Ku biir SomSpot oo bilow ogaanshaha heshiisyada maxaliga ah
forgot_password_subtitle: Geli lambarkaaga taleefanka waxaana kuu soo diri doonaa koodh xaqiijin ah si aad dib ugu dejiso furahaaga sirta.
create_new_password: Abuur fure sir ah oo cusub
create_new_password_subtitle: Geli Furahaaga Sirta ee Cusub si aad dib ugu dejiso furahaaga sirta.
complete_profile_subtitle: Naga caawi inaan shakhsiyeeyo waayo-aragnimadaada SomSpot
